Administrative delay. 

Imagine the DMV but worse.

HORMUZ TRANSITS TO RESUME UNDER NEW RULES

Iran’s Gulf waterways authority said vessels submitting approved transit requests will be allowed to pass through the Strait of Hormuz during the announced period, following the Islamabad MoU and official directives. https://t.co/XBWMy22oXo

thread_tweets.full_text:
If it’s not obvious, IRGC is going to use the permit mechanism to limit the flow. 

Administrative delay. 

Imagine the DMV but worse.

thread_tweets.text:
Except in this case, if you skip the line, they shoot at you. 

Diplomats will say, it’s open. 

Reality will say, no it’s not. 

Meanwhile, tanker owners are watching this and wondering how much more they should be charging and whether the risk is there to go back in.

tweets.full_text:
If it’s not obvious, IRGC is going to use the permit mechanism to limit the flow. 

Administrative delay. 

Imagine the DMV but worse.

Except in this case, if you skip the line, they shoot at you. 

Diplomats will say, it’s open. 

Reality will say, no it’s not. 

Meanwhile, tanker owners are watching this and wondering how much more they should be charging and whether the risk is there to go back in.

tweets.text:
I've stated multiple times the differences and how unlikely it is that Strategy actually dies off from this whole situation, but there are serious structural risks that they've taken on over the last couple of years and the most likely group that will pay the bill are MSTR holders.

There's almost no other way out of this mess other than significantly diluting MSTR via either issuing billions more ATM at what will most likely be a clearly non-accretive mNAV, or diluting them via selling a large chunk of BTC.
tweets.full_text:
